transcript: Speaker A: Oru vishayam dhaan enna pala varushama thaduthuttu irundhadhu. English pesra dhairiyam enakku illai. Meetings-la ideas irukkum, pesra time varum, naan amaithiya irundhuven. Classes pannen, YouTube pathen, aana problem fluency illai, problem confidence dhaan. Appo SpeakX try pannen. Mudhal naale AI-oda pesinen. Adhu judge pannadhu. Mistake panna correct sollum, pronunciation correct sollum. Moonu vaaram, 15 mins daily practice pannen. Ippo naan confidence-a pesren. Periya dramatic moment onnum illai. Naan nikkama pesinen, adhu podhum. [One thing held me back for many years. I didn't have the confidence to speak English. I would have ideas in meetings, but when it was time to speak, I would remain silent. I took classes, watched YouTube, but the problem wasn't fluency, the problem was confidence. Then I tried SpeakX. From day one, I spoke with AI. It doesn't judge. If I make a mistake, it corrects me, corrects my pronunciation. For three weeks, I practiced 15 minutes daily. Now I speak confidently. No big dramatic moment. I spoke without stopping, that's enough.]
on_screen_text: Oru vishayam [One thing], thaduthuttu irundhadhu [held me back], English pesra dhairiyam enakku illai [I didn't have the confidence to speak English], Aana Problem fluency [But the problem is fluency], problem confidence dhaan [the problem is confidence], Mistake, Pronunciation, SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE
summary: A young professional shares how a lack of confidence held him back from speaking English in office meetings. He tried various methods but finally succeeded by practicing 15 minutes daily with the SpeakX AI app, which corrected his mistakes without judgment. He now speaks English confidently and encourages others to try the app.
